reviews.comment:
Lo mejor es la parrilla y el parque que tienen atras al medio dia estaba fresco. Cada vez que voy a la custa paro alli para disfrutar todo lo que hay alli

(Translated by Google)
The best part is the grill and the park they have out back; it was cool and refreshing at midday. Every time I go to the coast, I stop there to enjoy everything it has to offer.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJa2NiNF9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada. Muy buen lugar. Personal atento y agradable

(Translated by Google)
A must-see. Great place. Friendly and helpful staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJa2VycTZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Me encanta hacer un alto en el camino y elegimos el ACA por la higiene que siempre encontramos en los sanitarios y la buena atención de los chicos en el market

(Translated by Google)
I love taking a break along the way and we chose ACA because of the cleanliness we always find in the restrooms and the good service from the market staff.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Lugar limpio y preparado para el publico rutero, con amplios espacios para estacionar y hacer una parada en ruta, daria un estrella mas si fuera menor la espera para pagar.

(Translated by Google)
